description_long: This rifle features a compact bullpup configuration with a dark green synthetic stock and an integrated pistol grip. The receiver is topped with a full-length Picatinny rail, supporting a mounted red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing stealth in urban environments. A detachable box magazine is inserted just behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup rifles. The fore-end includes a vertical grip for improved handling and control. The overall design is modern, streamlined, and optimized for maneuverability in confined spaces.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with a green synthetic stock, red dot sight, suppressor, and vertical foregrip, designed for urban maneuverability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, vertical foregrip, and the narrow profile of the barrel and sight.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the bullpup stock, red dot sight, vertical grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's width, the magazine's position, and the alignment of the sight and rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and suppressor.
